title: Translations for the Future Census consultation | Stats NZ
content:
## Translations for the Future Census consultation
The information on this page has been developed to support people who choose to submit feedback for the Future Census consultation.
Submissions for the Modernising our approach to the 2028 Census consultation closed at 5pm on 19 June 2024.
For more information or if you have any questions about the consultation, please:
- email 2028census@stats.govt.nz

## What you will find on this page
Te reo Māori Gagana Samoa / Samoa Lea Faka-Tonga / Tonga Te Gagana Tokelau / Tokelau Te Gana Tuvalu / Tuvalu Te Reo Māori Kuki ‘Āirani /Cook Islands Māori Vagahau Niue / Niue Vosa Vakaviti / Fiji
